message:
fix(replay): implement true FIFO trace eviction by registration order

The time travel engine previously used BTreeMap key iteration to select
the "oldest" trace for eviction, which evicted alphabetically-first
keys rather than the trace that was actually registered earliest.

Changes:
- Add VecDeque<String> registration order tracking to ReplayEngine
- Pop from front of registration queue for true FIFO eviction semantics
- Push new traces to back of queue on registration
- Sync remove_trace() to retain only traces still in the map, preventing
  stale queue entries after manual removal
- Add test: engine_capacity_evicts_oldest_registered_trace() — uses
  strategically named traces ("zzz-oldest", "aaa-*", "mmm-newest") to
  catch alphabetical-order eviction bugs
- Add test: engine_remove_trace_clears_registration_order() — validates
  queue stays consistent after manual trace removal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
